updates.tweet_text: Closing update #ES_F: Today was classic OPEX chop. Today's targets as long as 7535 held (which it did exactly) were 7558, 7578 (hit, this was today's target from the newsletter as well). 7590 Monday/Tuesday. Newsletter out soon with next entries
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7535, 7558, 7578, 7590) are morning-plan levels being reaffirmed as hit targets. No new actionable levels introduced.

updates.tweet_text:

Plan today: Just ride runner today. 7535-7578=a range. 7559, 7570/78, 7590+ next. https://t.co/iCCsqM19vY

updates.tweet_text: @noonelikeme81 We are just cnsolidating in a macro bull flag now. When the bull flag breaks though we will see a 500-1500 point leg up almost certainly. That's for the swing traders/investors though, not day traders like me
